whatsNew: ✨ Auto-update detection — Vault now checks for updates in the background and notifies you when a new version is available
📋 Help & What's New — this overlay, accessible anytime from Settings → Help
🔔 Update banner — a slim notification appears below the header when a new version is deployed, no manual refresh needed
⚙️ Service Worker — Vault now installs a service worker for faster loads and reliable background update checks
🏷️ Dynamic version — app version is now sourced from a live file, always accurate

features.title: Passwords & Credentials
features.desc: Store logins, app credentials, WiFi passwords, and notes. All entries are AES-256 encrypted on your device before anything is saved.

features.title: Categories & Search
features.desc: Entries are organised by type — App, WiFi, Note, Card, Bank, Identity. Filter by category or search across all entries instantly.

features.title: Favourites
features.desc: Star frequently used entries to pin them in the Starred tab for quick access.

features.title: Password Health
features.desc: Tap the shield icon on the home screen to review weak, duplicate, or old passwords. Helps you stay on top of security hygiene.

features.title: Documents
features.desc: Store encrypted files — PDFs, images, and more. Files are encrypted in IndexedDB on your device. Export as a zip backup anytime.

features.title: Biometric Unlock
features.desc: Enable fingerprint unlock from Settings → Security. Falls back to PIN if biometrics fail.

features.title: Cloud Sync
features.desc: Sign in with Google to back up your encrypted vault to Firestore. Your data is encrypted before it leaves your device — the cloud never sees plaintext.

features.title: Backup & Export
features.desc: Export an encrypted .vault file anytime from Settings → Backup. Import it on any device to restore. Documents can be exported separately as a .zip.
